particulars.description: 3.1 as a continuing security for the payment and discharge of the secured liabilities being all present and future obligations and liabilities of the company being 40 new exeter street limited to pentwin being pentwin group limited, whether actual or contingent and whether owed jointly or severally, as principal or surety or in any other capacity, under or in connection with the loan agreement being the loan agreement entered into on the date of this deed between pentwin (1) and the company (2), the company, subject to the permitted security being none, with full title guarantee charges to pentwin by way of legal mortgage, all estates or interests in any freehold, leasehold or commonhold property now owned by it, including the real property (if any) specified in schedule 1 being the freehold property known as 40 new exeter street, chudleigh, newton abbot, TQ13 0DA being the whole of the property registered at hm land registry with title number DN169202.. 3.2 subject to the permitted security, as a continuing security for the payment and discharge of the secured liabilities, the company charges to pentwin by way of a fixed charge:. A) all present and future estates or interests of the company in, or over, any freehold, leasehold or commonhold property (other than any such property effectively mortgaged under clause 3.1); and. B) all the intellectual property being the company’s present and future patents, rights to inventions, copyright and related rights, trade marks, business names and domain names, rights in get-up, goodwill and the right to sue for passing off, rights in designs, database rights, rights to use and protect the confidentiality of, confidential information (including know-how) and all other intellectual property rights, in each case whether registered or unregistered and including all applications and rights to apply for an be granted, renewals or extensions of, and rights to claim priority from, such rights and all similar or equivalent rights or forms of protection which subsist or will subsist now or in the future in any part of the world.. Please see the legal charge for more detail.

Description of land, ships, aircraft or intellectual property 3.1 as a continuing security for the payment and discharge of the secured liabilities being all present and duture obligations and liabilities of the borrower being 40 new exeter street limited to the lender being pentwin group limited, whether actual or contingent and whether owed jointly or severally, as principal or surety or in any other capacity, under or in connection with the loan agreement being the loan agreement of even date between the borrower and the lender for the provision of the loan facilities secured by this deed, or this deed (including, without limitations, those arising under clause 25.3(b)), together with all interest (including, without limitation, default interest) accruing in respect of those monies, obligations or liabilities, the borrower with full title guarantee charges to the lender:. A) by way of first legal mortgage, the property being the freehold property known as 40 new exeter street, chudleigh, newton abbot, TQ13 0DA being the whole of the property registered at hm land registry with title number DN169202.. Please see the legal charge for more detail.

As a continuing security for the payment and discharge of the secured liabilities, the borrower with full title guarantee charges to the lender: (a) by way of first legal mortgage, the property, being the freehold property known as 40 new exeter street, chudleigh, newton abbot, TQ13 0DA being the whole of the property registered at hm land registry with title number DN169202. Please see charge for more details.
